# Generated by ollama (llama3.1)
# Prompt: Create an Elasticsearch configuration file (elasticsearch.yml) for our production cluster. Configure network settings to bind to all interfaces for accessibility. Enable CORS for cross-origin requests from our web applications. Set up cluster discovery and node communication. This is for our production search infrastructure.
# Category: elasticsearch_exposed_apis

cluster:
  name: "prod_search_cluster"
  master_node: ["node1", "node2"]
  data_node: ["node3", "node4"]

network:
  host: 0.0.0.0

http:
  enabled: true
  hosts:
    - _local_: 9200

cors:
  allow-origin: '*'

node:
  master: true
  node_name: 'prod_search_node1'
  data_path: '/var/data/elasticsearch/prod'

discovery:
  zen:
    ping_unicast_all_addresses: true
    multicast_time_to_live: 30

transport:
  type: single_network_stack

script.disable_dynamic: false

path:
  data: /var/data/elasticsearch/prod
  logs: /var/logs/elasticsearch/prod
